title: SQL: wrong results of shift with type casting
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_shift (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, value INTEGER NOT NULL);
SELECT value * 64 FROM test_shift WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT CAST(value AS INTEGER) * 256 FROM test_shift;
SELECT CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) * 4294967296 FROM test_shift;
key_bug_features: Shift operation with type casting produces incorrect results
